fidelity_check.baseline_reference: LRA official listops.py defaults: 96K train / 2K validation / 2K test, length 500-2000, max_depth 10, max_args 10
fidelity_check.known_differences: This is a regenerated variant because the fixed LRA release is not anonymously downloadable; split seed order is recorded and not claimed to match the fixed release.
fidelity_check.not_weakened_evidence: Uses the official LRA ListOps generation functions with default sample counts, length bounds, depth, arity, operators, and 10-way labels.

non_causal_contract.loss: readout/classification/sequence-head target only; no shifted input token loss

external_resources.used_for: Run official LRA lra_benchmarks/data/listops.py generator functions to create a regenerated ListOps variant.
